acceptedAnswer.text: Uber Intercity helps you conveniently book comfortable cars online or from the Uber app so you can travel outstation. Whether you want to travel from Chennai to Bangalore or to another destination, there’s a vehicle for your travel needs. Enjoy door-to-door pickup and dropoff every time.

While signed in to your Uber account, open the Uber app, then enter the pickup and dropoff addresses in the “Where to?” box. From there, select your preferred Intercity ride option to confirm your trip from Chennai to Bangalore.

You can also book outstation cabs online. First sign in to your Uber account, enter your pickup and dropoff locations, then select one of the Uber Intercity options to request an outstation cab to take you from Chennai to Bangalore.

mainEntity.name: How do I request a ride for outstation travel from Chennai to Bangalore?

acceptedAnswer.text: Several ride options are available to help you get from Chennai to Bangalore. For groups with up to 4 people, select Go Intercity or Sedan Intercity. If you’re travelling with up to 6 people, select UberXL Intercity as your ride option.

mainEntity.name: What ride options are available to get from Chennai to Bangalore?

acceptedAnswer.text: On average, it costs ₹5202 to travel from Chennai to Bangalore with Uber Intercity. Prices may vary due to weather, traffic, and other factors.

mainEntity.name: How much does a cab cost to get from Chennai to Bangalore?

acceptedAnswer.text: On average, it takes 8 hours to travel from Chennai to Bangalore with Uber Intercity. Duration may vary due to traffic and other factors.

mainEntity.name: How much time does it take to get from Chennai to Bangalore?

acceptedAnswer.text: You can cancel your ride from Chennai to Bangalore at any time with Uber Intercity. Cancellation fees depend on the overall distance and time that a driver travelled while picking up the rider for a cancelled trip.

mainEntity.name: What is the cancellation policy for cabs booked from Chennai to Bangalore?

acceptedAnswer.text: You can use cash, Paytm, Amazon Pay, and Uber for Business payment methods to pay for your trip from Chennai to Bangalore with Uber Intercity.

mainEntity.name: How can I pay for my trip from Chennai to Bangalore with Uber Intercity?

acceptedAnswer.text: The most affordable ride option to book to get from Chennai to Bangalore is Uber Go Intercity.

mainEntity.name: What is the most affordable ride option to book to get from Chennai to Bangalore?

acceptedAnswer.text: Safety is a priority for rides booked with Uber Intercity. You can access in-app safety features such as Share My Trip so that someone always knows where you are while travelling from Chennai to Bangalore or another destination.

mainEntity.name: Is it safe to book outstation cabs with Uber Intercity?

acceptedAnswer.text: The average distance from Chennai to Bangalore by outstation cab is 335 kilometers. The average distance may vary due to traffic and other factors.

mainEntity.name: What is the distance from Chennai to Bangalore by outstation cab?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, you can request a round-trip ride with Uber Intercity. Check in the app to see if round-trip rides are available from Chennai to Bangalore.
